name: the hunters
identity: A disciplined group of younger villagers responsible for protecting the camp and maintaining the fire. They have adapted sustainable practices and communal planning for survival, showing a strong sense of duty. Their role has evolved to include learning and observing the art of hunting as it is lived, integrating this knowledge into their existing duties.
current_status: Engaged in new responsibilities: changing hunting patterns, mapping migration paths, preparing gifts for the southern tribes, and participating in the study of the fragment. They are also tasked with mentoring a young unbound hunter, emphasizing learning over mere performance.

altered_methods.value: communal planning, efficiency, sustainability, and knowledge integration

volatile_state.current_activity: Engaged in new responsibilities: changing hunting patterns, mapping migration paths, preparing gifts for the southern tribes, and participating in the study of the fragment. Mentoring a young unbound hunter.
volatile_state.condition: attentive and focused on new instructions

notes: Hunters are now involved in learning, knowledge integration, and community engagement beyond traditional hunting and protection duties.
